Class IuTransaction

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.transaction.IuTransaction
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.transaction.Transaction, jakarta.transaction.TransactionSynchronizationRegistry
public class IuTransaction extends Object implements jakarta.transaction.Transaction, jakarta.transaction.TransactionSynchronizationRegistry
Portable Transaction implementation.

Transactions managed via this implementation are time-sensitive and tracked asynchronously to force rollback before enlisted resource timeouts expire.

This implementation supports distributed transaction branches with heuristic commit/rollback, and join logic. It is thread-safe and intended for use with high-volume parallel processing workloads.

    Creates a new root transaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • IuTransaction

      public IuTransaction(Duration timeout)
      Creates a new root transaction.
      Parameters:
      timeout - transaction timeout; unless completed beforehand, the transaction will automatically roll back when the timeout expires, using the same the context transaction was created in.

    • IuTransaction

      public IuTransaction(Duration timeout, Consumer<IuTransaction> onStatusChange)
      Creates a new root transaction.
      Parameters:
      timeout - transaction timeout; unless completed beforehand, the transaction will automatically roll back when the timeout expires, using the same the context transaction was created in.
      onStatusChange - Consumer, will be provided a reference to this transaction each time its status changes

    • IuTransaction

      public IuTransaction(IuTransaction parent)
      Creates a new branch transaction.
      Parameters:
      parent - parent transaction

      Returns:

      Returns:
      string representation

    • join

      public void join(IuTransaction branch)
      Joins two transaction branches.
      Parameters:
      branch - IuTransaction; must have the same Xid.getGlobalTransactionId() as this, should be a direct branch of this.

    • suspend

      public void suspend()
      Suspends this transaction if active on the current thread.

      Suspend puts the transaction into a state where it can be passed off to another thread or ModuleLayer, potentially in a remote VM if all resources have been delisted, and/or will be enlisted on the remote VM prior to resume(). Same-ModuleLayer transactions may be suspended and resumed with the same active resources.

    • resume

      public void resume()
      Resumes a suspended transaction.

    • commit

      public void commit() throws jakarta.transaction.RollbackException, jakarta.transaction.HeuristicRollbackException, jakarta.transaction.HeuristicMixedException
      Specified by:
      commit in interface jakarta.transaction.Transaction
      Throws:
      jakarta.transaction.RollbackException
      jakarta.transaction.HeuristicRollbackException
      jakarta.transaction.HeuristicMixedException

    • rollback

      Specified by:

    • isCompleted

      boolean isCompleted()
      Determines whether or not the transaction is a completed status.
      Returns:
      true if status is Status.STATUS_COMMITTED, Status.STATUS_ROLLEDBACK, or Status.STATUS_NO_TRANSACTION; else false
